name: webooks

scripts.dev: node scripts/generate-prisma-schema.js && node scripts/init-database.js && next dev
scripts.start: node scripts/generate-prisma-schema.js && node scripts/init-database.js && next start
scripts.db:reset: node scripts/generate-prisma-schema.js && prisma db push && node test-script/reset-database.js
scripts.deploy: node scripts/generate-prisma-schema.js && prisma generate && prisma db push && next build

description: Webooks is a bookmark manager that allows users to save, organize, and share their bookmarks. It features a user-friendly interface, secure authentication, and a powerful API for integration with other tools.
author: Lande
